subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of the Threshold of the Most Glorious Beauty! Praise be to God that the ocean of favors is surging high and the flood of bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان آستان جمال ابهی حمد خدا را که بحر الطاف پر هیجانست و سیل فیض و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
